inputs.label: Initial Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the material before the drying process.

inputs.label: Initial Moisture Content
inputs.businessContext: Moisture content of the material before drying as a percentage of total weight.

inputs.label: Final Moisture Content
inputs.businessContext: Desired moisture content after drying as a percentage of total weight.

inputs.label: Target Weight Loss
inputs.businessContext: Expected weight loss based on process specifications for comparison.
